scripts.sync-version: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const fs=require('fs'); let c=fs.readFileSync('src-tauri/Cargo.toml','utf8'); c=c.replace(/^version = \".*\"/m,'version = \"'+v+'\"'); fs.writeFileSync('src-tauri/Cargo.toml',c); let t=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('src-tauri/tauri.conf.json','utf8')); t.version=v; fs.writeFileSync('src-tauri/tauri.conf.json',JSON.stringify(t,null,2)+'\n'); console.log('Synced version:',v)"
